notes: Post-repair menu contains 40 current items: 36 retained frozen items plus four current specials; three frozen rotating specials are reconciled as stale extras.
15 frozen items retain direct positive official-menu disclosures, 21 are accurately unavailable, and three stale items are not applicable.
No negative or cross-contact conclusion is inferred from the absence of a comprehensive allergen guide.
Verified repair reconciles current monthly specials and restricts fixed positive claims to explicit official menu wording.

findings.summary: Three frozen rotating specials were stale and four current official specials were omitted.
findings.resolution: Removed Chocolate S'mores, Peach Melba, and Strawberry Shortcake; added Peach Cobbler, Chocolate Birthday Cake, Cherry Pie, and Classic Cruller.

findings.summary: Several baseline allergen claims relied on culinary product names rather than explicit restaurant-authored allergen wording.
findings.resolution: Removed unsupported brioche, quesadilla, cake, bun, mayo, cookie, and peanut-butter dairy inferences while retaining explicit milk, egg, wheat, peanut, and other direct terms.

findings.summary: The official menu contains selected positive ingredient prose but no comprehensive allergen matrix, complete ingredients, negative-claim coverage, or cross-contact policy.
findings.resolution: The limitation is accurately represented by retaining only direct positives and marking unsupported results unavailable.

repairs.summary: Removed three stale specials, added four current specials, and narrowed positive allergen signals to explicit official menu wording.
verificationCommands: node --test --test-name-pattern='Astro DC reconciles current specials' scripts/restaurant-pipeline.test.mjs

notes: Focused Astro DC regression passed; all 39 frozen item checks are non-pending.
